name: Potential Continued Risky Web Server Activity
notes: This rule triggers when unsafe http methods are seen continuously. This could be a malicious attacker updating web application contents.
conditions_text: when this sequence of BB:Threats: Unsafe HTTP Methods, Potential Website Content Update, involving the same source and destination hosts in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Potential Continued Risky Web Server Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when this sequence of BB:Threats: Unsafe HTTP Methods, Potential Website Content Update, involving the same source and destination hosts in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Potential Continued Risky Web Server Activity
Event description: Detects when unsafe http methods are seen continuously.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
